vision_profile.current_state: Priyamvada is a student or fresher eager to develop professional English communication skills within a technical career path.
vision_profile.main_blocker: The primary challenge is translating a general desire for English communication into concrete technical skills for a specific career role.
vision_profile.top_motivation: Priyamvada is motivated to acquire new skills to secure a professional role and improve communication abilities in English.

milestones.label: P1
milestones.identity_statement: Lay the groundwork for your AI journey by mastering essential programming and core AI concepts.
milestones.market_value_display: Fresher — not yet earning from this skill

modules.title: Introduction to AI & Python
modules.description: Understand what AI is and get started with Python programming, the language of AI.

skills.title: Fundamentals of Artificial Intelligence
skills.description: Learn the core concepts, history, and applications of AI.

skills.title: Python Basics for AI
skills.description: Master fundamental Python syntax, data types, and control structures.

skills.title: Python Data Structures
skills.description: Learn to use lists, dictionaries, tuples, and sets effectively in Python.

video.title: Working with Python Lists and Dictionaries

modules.title: Data Handling with Python
modules.description: Learn to work with data using essential Python libraries like NumPy and Pandas.

skills.title: Introduction to NumPy
skills.description: Understand array operations and numerical computing with NumPy.

skills.title: Data Manipulation with Pandas
skills.description: Learn to load, clean, and transform data using Pandas DataFrames.

scenario.title: Clean and Filter a Dataset with Pandas

skills.title: Data Visualization Basics
skills.description: Create basic plots and charts to understand data patterns using Matplotlib/Seaborn.

video.title: Plotting with Matplotlib: Line and Bar Charts

modules.title: Core AI Concepts & Ethics
modules.description: Dive deeper into AI paradigms and understand the ethical implications of AI technologies.

skills.title: Types of AI and Learning
skills.description: Distinguish between different AI types like supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning.

skills.title: AI Ethics and Bias
skills.description: Explore ethical considerations in AI development, including fairness, transparency, and bias.

video.title: Understanding AI Bias and its Impact

skills.title: Responsible AI Development
skills.description: Learn principles and practices for building AI systems responsibly and fairly.

milestones.label: P2
milestones.identity_statement: Build practical machine learning models and understand their underlying principles to solve real-world problems.

modules.title: Supervised Learning Fundamentals
modules.description: Explore foundational supervised learning algorithms for classification and regression.

skills.title: Linear Regression
skills.description: Understand and implement linear regression for predicting continuous values.

scenario.title: Predict House Prices with Linear Regression

skills.title: Logistic Regression
skills.description: Implement logistic regression for binary classification tasks.

scenario.title: Classify Customer Churn with Logistic Regression

skills.title: Decision Trees and Random Forests
skills.description: Learn tree-based models for both classification and regression, and ensemble methods.

scenario.title: Build a Fraud Detection Model with Random Forest

modules.title: Unsupervised Learning & Evaluation
modules.description: Discover clustering techniques and how to evaluate the performance of your machine learning models.

skills.title: K-Means Clustering
skills.description: Apply K-Means to group similar data points without prior labels.

skills.title: Model Evaluation Metrics
skills.description: Learn to assess model performance using metrics like accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score.

skills.title: Hyperparameter Tuning
skills.description: Optimize model performance by tuning hyperparameters using techniques like GridSearchCV.

scenario.title: Tune a Classification Model for Best Performance

modules.title: Feature Engineering & Preprocessing
modules.description: Learn to prepare and transform raw data into features suitable for machine learning models.

skills.title: Data Preprocessing Techniques
skills.description: Handle missing values, outliers, and scale features for model readiness.

skills.title: Feature Engineering
skills.description: Create new, impactful features from existing data to improve model performance.

scenario.title: Engineer Features for a Predictive Model

skills.title: Dimensionality Reduction (PCA)
skills.description: Reduce the number of features while preserving important information using PCA.

scenario.title: Apply PCA to a High-Dimensional Dataset

milestones.label: P3
milestones.identity_statement: Explore the exciting world of Generative AI and understand how to prepare AI models for real-world use.

modules.title: Introduction to Generative AI
modules.description: Understand the concepts and applications of Generative AI, including large language models.

skills.title: Generative AI Fundamentals
skills.description: Learn what Generative AI is, its history, and key applications.

scenario.title: Identify Use Cases for Generative AI

skills.title: Large Language Models (LLMs) Basics
skills.description: Understand the architecture and capabilities of foundational LLMs.

skills.title: Prompt Engineering Fundamentals
skills.description: Learn to craft effective prompts to guide LLMs for desired outputs.

modules.title: AI Model Deployment Concepts
modules.description: Understand the basics of how AI models are deployed and integrated into applications.

skills.title: Introduction to System Design for AI
skills.description: Learn fundamental concepts of designing systems that incorporate AI models.

video.title: High-Level System Design for AI Applications

skills.title: API Fundamentals for AI Models
skills.description: Understand how APIs enable communication with and deployment of AI models.

scenario.title: Design a Simple API for an ML Model

skills.title: Containerization Basics (Docker Concepts)
skills.description: Learn the basics of containerization with Docker for consistent model deployment.

video.title: Introduction to Docker for AI Applications

modules.title: AI Project Workflow & Next Steps
modules.description: Understand the full lifecycle of an AI project and plan your continuous learning path.

skills.title: AI Project Lifecycle Overview
skills.description: Gain an understanding of the typical stages in an AI/ML project, from data to deployment.

scenario.title: Map Stages of an AI Chatbot Project

skills.title: Continuous Learning & AI Trends
skills.description: Stay updated with the latest advancements and emerging trends in the AI field.

video.title: Staying Current in the Fast-Paced AI World

skills.title: Building an AI Portfolio
skills.description: Learn how to showcase your AI projects and skills to potential employers.

video.title: Creating an Impressive AI Project Portfolio
